section.intent: Provide minimal, non-intrusive links to key sections and a persistent 'Buy' button.
section.contentHints: Logo in liquid metal style, 'Lineup', 'Location', 'Tickets' links, and a neon CTA button.

designPlan.goal: Provide a persistent, high-contrast anchor for navigation and conversion.
designPlan.roleFit: Ensures the Event Seeker can always find the 'Buy' path regardless of scroll depth.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Maintains the 'Click CTA' step of the conversion loop.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Showcases the acid aesthetic through a liquid metal logo and neon accents.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Logo left, anchored links center, high-visibility CTA right.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Floating glassmorphic or high-contrast solid bar with minimal padding.
designPlan.visualIntent: Sharp, neon-bordered container with metallic typography.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Smooth scroll to anchors; hover states use glitch or color-shift effects.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Minimalist text to keep focus on the visual energy of the page.
constraints: Must remain legible against high-contrast backgrounds
CTA must be the most vibrant element
designPlan.rationale: A floating nav ensures the conversion path is never more than one click away in a long-scroll experience.
